title: Atlanta Heat Wave
lead: Atlanta is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.09, indicating a highly unusual event. The city's temperature has reached critical levels, with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Atlanta has resulted in a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD), with a value of 9.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 57%, and the wind speed is approximately 8.5 km/h, offering little relief from the heat. 
 The heat wave is expected to persist, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded, and a critical level of 10.0/10, indicating a potentially life-threatening situation.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
